CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, s1 VARCHAR(255), s2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, endswith(s1, s2, true) FROM test_strings WHERE s1 IS NOT NULL AND s2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, endswith(s1, s2, false) FROM test_strings WHERE s1 IS NOT NULL AND s2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, endswith(s1, s2, true) AS case_insensitive FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE s1 LIKE 'O%');
SELECT CASE WHEN endswith(s1, s2, true) THEN 'Match' ELSE 'No Match' END AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT t1.id, endswith(t1.s1, t2.s2, true) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN s1 IS NOT NULL AND s2 IS NOT NULL THEN endswith(s1, s2, true) ELSE NULL END AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE endswith(s1, 'Hello', true);
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE endswith(s1, s2, false) AND s1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE endswith(s1, 'data', true) UNION SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE endswith('data', s2, false);
